file.content:
name: CI
on:
  - push
  - pull_request
jobs:
  Linux:
    strategy:
      fail-fast: false
      matrix:
        include:
          - jdk: 6
          - jdk: 7
          - jdk: 8
          - jdk: 8
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 9
          - jdk: 10
          - jdk: 11
          - jdk: 11
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 12
          - jdk: 13
          - jdk: 14
          - jdk: 15
          - jdk: 16
          - jdk: 17
          - jdk: 17
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 18
          - jdk: 19
          - jdk: 20
          - jdk: 21
          - jdk: 21
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 22
          - jdk: 23
          - jdk: 23
            ecj: true
          - jdk: 24
          - jdk: 25
          - jdk: 26
    name: JDK ${{ matrix.jdk }}${{ matrix.ecj && ' with ECJ' || ''}}
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: |
            ${{ matrix.jdk }}
            21
      - name: 'Generate toolchains.xml'
        env:
          JDK_VERSION: ${{ matrix.jdk }}
          JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME: JAVA_HOME_${{ matrix.jdk }}_X64
        run: |
          echo "
          <toolchains>
            <toolchain>
              <type>jdk</type>
              <provides>
                <id>$JDK_VERSION</id>
                <version>$JDK_VERSION</version>
              </provides>
              <configuration>
                <jdkHome>${!JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME}</jdkHome>
              </configuration>
            </toolchain>
          </toolchains>
          " > toolchains.xml
      - name: 'Build'
        run: |
          ./mvnw -V -B -e --no-transfer-progress \
            verify -Djdk.version=${{ matrix.jdk }} -Dbytecode.version=${{ matrix.jdk }} \
            ${{ matrix.ecj && '-Decj' || ''}} \
            --toolchains=toolchains.xml
  Windows:
    runs-on: windows-2025
    environment: ${{ (github.repository == 'jacoco/jacoco' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/master') && 'snapshot' || null }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd # v6.0.2
      - uses: actions/setup-java@be666c2fcd27ec809703dec50e508c2fdc7f6654 # v5.2.0
        with:
          distribution: 'zulu'
          java-version: |
            6
            21
      - name: 'Generate toolchains.xml'
        env:
          JDK_VERSION: 6
          JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME: JAVA_HOME_6_X64
        shell: bash
        run: |
          echo "
          <toolchains>
            <toolchain>
              <type>jdk</type>
              <provides>
                <id>$JDK_VERSION</id>
                <version>$JDK_VERSION</version>
              </provides>
              <configuration>
                <jdkHome>${!JDK_HOME_VARIABLE_NAME}</jdkHome>
              </configuration>
            </toolchain>
          </toolchains>
          " > toolchains.xml
      - name: 'Build'
        shell: bash
        run: |
          ./mvnw -V -B -e --no-transfer-progress \
            verify -Djdk.version=6 -Dbytecode.version=5 \
            -f org.jacoco.build \
            ${{ secrets.SONARQUBE_TOKEN && 'sonar:sonar' || '' }} \
            -Dsonar.scanner.skipJreProvisioning \
            -Dsonar.organization=default \
            -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io \
            --toolchains=toolchains.xml
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONARQUBE_TOKEN }}
      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@043fb46d1a93c77aae656e7c1c64a875d1fc6a0a # v7.0.1
        id: artifact-upload-step
        with:
          name: jacoco
          path: jacoco/target/*.zip
          if-no-files-found: error
  CI:
    needs:
      - Linux
      - Windows
    # without following condition this job can have result "skipped" if needed job was "skipped"
    # auto-merge ignores skipped jobs even if they are required by branch protection rules
    if: ${{ always() }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-24.04
    steps:
      - name: Check results of all needed jobs
        run: |
          R=$(echo "$NEEDS" | jq --compact-output '[.[].result] | unique')
          if [ "$R" = '["success"]' ]; then
            exit 0
          else
            exit 1
          fi
        env:
          NEEDS: ${{ toJSON(needs) }}

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Zulu JDK 11 and JDK 21
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    zulu-11-jdk \
    zulu-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \

    rm zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64.tar.gz && \
    mv /opt/java/zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64 /opt/java/jdk11

    wget -q https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu21.36.17-ca-jdk21.0.3-linux_x64.tar.gz && \

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Download and install Zulu JDK 11
RUN mkdir -p /opt/java && \
    cd /tmp && \
    wget -q https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64.tar.gz -C /opt/java && \
    rm zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64.tar.gz && \
    mv /opt/java/zulu11.72.19-ca-jdk11.0.24-linux_x64 /opt/java/jdk11

# Download and install Zulu JDK 21
RUN cd /tmp && \
    wget -q https://cdn.azul.com/zulu/bin/zulu21.36.17-ca-jdk21.0.3-linux_x64.tar.gz && \
    tar -xzf zulu21.36.17-ca-jdk21.0.3-linux_x64.tar.gz -C /opt/java && \
    rm zulu21.36.17-ca-jdk21.0.3-linux_x64.tar.gz && \
    mv /opt/java/zulu21.36.17-ca-jdk21.0.3-linux_x64 /opt/java/jdk21

# Set up environment variables
ENV JAVA_HOME_11_X64=/opt/java/jdk11
ENV JAVA_HOME_21_X64=/opt/java/jdk21
ENV JAVA_HOME=$JAVA_HOME_11_X64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

content.thinking:
Interesting! The build needs JDK 21 or higher, not JDK 11. But the job is named "JDK 11", which means JDK 11 should be used to compile the code for JDK 11 bytecode. The enforcer rule is checking the *runtime* JDK version, which needs to be JDK 21+.

This is actually a common pattern in Java projects - you use a newer JDK to run Maven/compile, and then configure the compiler to target an older JDK bytecode version. So I need to:
1. Set JAVA_HOME to JDK 21 (for running Maven)
2. But the toolchains.xml should point to JDK 11 for compilation

Let me update the Dockerfile and run.sh accordingly.

FROM ubuntu:24.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

# Install system dependencies and OpenJDK
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y --no-install-recommends \
    ca-certificates \
    curl \
    wget \
    git \
    unzip \
    openjdk-11-jdk \
    openjdk-21-jdk \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Set up environment variables - use JDK 21 for running Maven
ENV JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
ENV PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

WORKDIR /app

# Copy the repository
COPY repo/ /app/

# Copy the run script
COPY run.sh /run.sh
RUN chmod +x /run.sh

ENTRYPOINT ["/run.sh"]

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -e

# Use JDK 21 to run Maven (enforcer requires 21+)
export JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-21-openjdk-amd64
export PATH=$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH

# Verify Java is available
java -version

# Generate toolchains.xml - use JDK 11 for compilation
cat > toolchains.xml << 'EOF'
